description: Plugin-distributed hooks for retail-store-operations. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable retail anti-patterns (a sell-through/GMROI/weeks-of-supply metric with no formula or window; a markdown with no sell-through/weeks-of-supply trigger; a 'safety stock'/'buffer' change with no named service level; inventory judged on raw on-hand units). Set RETAIL_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
